subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst seize the souls of all things and didst quicken them anew [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به قبضت ارواح کل الاشیا و احییت مره
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @prayer for detachment
